error_code_reference.meaning: Bad Request - validation failed on input fields
Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth token
Forbidden - caller lacks permission for this resource
Not Found - resource id does not exist
Conflict - duplicate resource or state conflict
Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded
Internal Server Error - unexpected server failure

endpoints.description: List all users, supports pagination and filtering.
Create a new user record.
Retrieve a single user by its unique id.
Update an existing user record (full replace).
Delete a user record permanently.
